title: Niconicos Neon Genesis Evangelion Anime Screening
display_title: Niconicos Neon Genesis Evangelion Anime Screening
wikitext:
[]: Niconico's Neon Genesis Evangelion Anime Screening             Quote Post by JB2448 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 3:50 am Does anyone know what's up with this? All I know is that it seems to be that Niconico Live is going to stream the original anime in several weekly three- and two-episode chunks. Is there anything new that people who already own the series should tune in to watch out for?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 25, 2012 12:17 pm it's to hype people up for 3.0. I'm not sure if it will offer anything new.

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 12:35 pm Isn't there a thread for this?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 25, 2012 12:43 pm yes.On the rebuild Sub forum but that was addressing a TV broadcast if I'm not mistaken. The search function can be very helpful.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Oct 25, 2012 12:43 pm ^ ^ Nope, I think that it was mentioned in the trailer thread and I asked a question about it in the NTV airing thread but I think that there's was no specific thread about the Niconico's streaming of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Oct 25, 2012 12:45 pm Sorry, my mistake.
